compiled_state.title: Write integration test fixture for autonomous worktree resume recovery
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
d187-aa91 — Integration test fixture for interrupted-session recovery

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Create `tests/scripts/test-worktree-resume-integration.sh` with 2 integration test cases using a real temp git repo (git init in a temp dir — not mocked):

**Setup fixture (shared):**
- `git init $TMPDIR`
- Create initial commit on main
- Create branch `abandoned-feature-branch` with 1 unique commit
- Write mock WORKTREE_TRACKING:start ticket comment (via a stub or fixture function that mimics ticket comment format)
- Create a stub `resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh` invocation or source the script under test

**Test 1: test_resume_merges_unique_branch**
- Branch has 1 unique commit not in HEAD
- Invoke resume scan logic
- Assert: branch was merged into current branch (git log contains commit)
- Assert: no manual git commands required (merge was automatic)

**Test 2: test_resume_discards_already_merged_branch**  
- Branch is an ancestor of HEAD (force-merged before test)
- Invoke resume scan logic
- Assert: no re-merge attempted
- Assert: outcome logged as already_merged or discarded

Both tests should exercise `plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh` when it exists (failing RED now).

Add .test-index entry:
```
plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh tests/scripts/test-worktree-resume-integration.sh
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New test file exists at tests/scripts/test-worktree-resume-integration.sh and is executable
- [ ] Both tests fail RED (resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh does not exist yet)
- [ ] Tests use real git init in temp dir (not mocked git)
- [ ] Tests are deterministic (fixed branch names, fixed commit messages)
- [ ] .test-index entry added for resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh
